name: Black Forest Pumpernickel Bread (Abm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Knead the dough until smooth and well combined.
3. Cover and let rest for 30 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Place dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 1 hour, or until light crust setting is achieved and cool for 1 hour before slicing.
7. Optional: Add 1 teaspoon instant espresso powder for added flavor. Alternatively, bake the bread on a dough cycle and finish in an oven.
